title: euphrasia officinalis subsp. nemorosa
intro: Euphrasia officinalis subsp. nemorosa, also known as wood sorrel or mountain eye, is a perennial plant species belonging to the gentian family. The plant contains bioactive compounds like flavonoids and iridoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of wood sorrel include its potential to soothe eye irritations, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system. Wood sorrel can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or dried extract, making it a valuable addition to traditional medicine and natural health remedies.
